subcodes.first_line: This is the Day of the Most Great Manifestation, and all things rejoice in the remembrance of the Peerless Friend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم یوم ظهور اعظم و جمیع اشیا بذکر دوست یکتا مسرور و حزم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @naming of children; of individuals, @praise and encouragement
